text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I are doing some typical
training, when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Let's take a little break! I want some ice
cream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho seems strangely lethargic. I wonder
if she's been snacking too much.
choice_data_list:
If you eat sugar every break, you're going to
gain weight.

If you eat sugar every break, you're going to
gain weight.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna gain weight, you dummy! I'm a
witch! You're so dumb! Not to mention rude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just to make sure, we go to the infirmary for a
weigh-in.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
N-nothing's changed at all! I haven't gained an
ounce! I'm in perfect shape today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it was just my imagination. I go to give her
some vanilla ice cream, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
G-get that away from me! I mean, uh, I feel like
chocolate mint today! I won't eat any other
flavor!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Let's just get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho seems strangely motivated when we
get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Check it out, Familiar! Right on the dot!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I've always had complete control of my weight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I'm relieved to hear that she's back at
peak racing weight.
